entries.definition: مُصْفَرّ muṣfarr [quasi-act. part.] yellow, turning yellow, withering away (39:21) ثُمَّ يُخْرِجُ بِهِ زَرْعًا مُّخْتَلِفًا أَلْوَانُهُ ثُمَّ يَهِيجُ فَتَرَاهُ مُصْفَرًّا ثُمَّ يَجْعَلُهُ حُطَامًا then He brings forth with it vegetation of various colours; then it wilts, so you see it turning yellow; then He turns it into debris.
entries.definition_english: مُصْفَرّ muṣfarr [quasi-act. part.] yellow, turning yellow, withering away (39:21) ثُمَّ يُخْرِجُ بِهِ زَرْعًا مُّخْتَلِفًا أَلْوَانُهُ ثُمَّ يَهِيجُ فَتَرَاهُ مُصْفَرًّا ثُمَّ يَجْعَلُهُ حُطَامًا then He brings forth with it vegetation of various colours; then it wilts, so you see it turning yellow; then He turns it into debris.

entries.definition:
ṣ–f–ṣ–f to be empty, deserted or vacant; a level tract of land with no herbage or water. Of this root, one form, صَفْصَفًا ṣafṣafan, occurs once in the Qurʾan.
صَفْصَف ṣafṣaf [quasi-act. (possibly pass.) part.] levelled to the ground, smooth, having no herbage (20:106–107) فَيَذَرُهَا قَاعًا صَفْصَفًا لَّا تَرَىٰ فِيهَا عِوَجًا وَلَا أَمْتًا He will leave it a flat plain, you will see no peak or trough in it.
entries.definition_english:
ṣ–f–ṣ–f to be empty, deserted or vacant; a level tract of land with no herbage or water. Of this root, one form, صَفْصَفًا ṣafṣafan, occurs once in the Qurʾan.
صَفْصَف ṣafṣaf [quasi-act. (possibly pass.) part.] levelled to the ground, smooth, having no herbage (20:106–107) فَيَذَرُهَا قَاعًا صَفْصَفًا لَّا تَرَىٰ فِيهَا عِوَجًا وَلَا أَمْتًا He will leave it a flat plain, you will see no peak or trough in it.
